title: The Faery Forest
content:
The faery forest glimmered
Beneath an ivory moon,
The silver grasses shimmered
Against a faery tune.

Beneath the silken silence
The crystal branches slept,
And dreaming thro� the dew-fall
The cold white blossoms wept.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "The Faery Forest"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
